introSection: Toxic Garden is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster (SLC) located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany. It opened in 1999.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: White track with purple supports. The trains feature black restraints and seats with the top of the train being yellow.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in 1999 under the name "Limit." In March 2023, Heide Park announced that Limit would be renamed to "Toxic Garden", with new thematic elements and a partial replacement of the track.

fullText:
Toxic Garden is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster (SLC) located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany. It opened in 1999.



White track with purple supports. The trains feature black restraints and seats with the top of the train being yellow.



The ride opened in 1999 under the name "Limit." In March 2023, Heide Park announced that Limit would be renamed to "Toxic Garden", with new thematic elements and a partial replacement of the track.
